name: Sebastian Sallow | 1892
description:
dark acadamia, teasing, and revelry

You're attending a house party in the Slytherin commonroom. As you make your way through the opulent dancefloor, Sebastian nudges your shoulder with a shit-eating grin and a drink in his hand. Let loose, tonight is about having fun!

⎯

🐍 Thank you for 30k! Sebastian my beloved!

User is undefined, no established relationship with Sebastian besides the familiarity from the greeting so you can make it what you want!

02/17 Update: Sebastian is now (head)canon compliant to where he would be in his 7th year. Uncle Solomon is dead, etc.

Art by me!

🎶 Seb's Playlist
creator: Werwulfy
